nodes.speaker: system
nodes.text: 08:00. Raka forwards you an investment pitch promising 30% monthly returns. He plans to transfer money before 16:00 unless you can help him think clearly.

choices.text: Start by checking the message at home.

nodes.speaker: raka
nodes.text: Kak, Dimas says this group is funding halal SMEs. Thirty percent monthly sounds like the answer to everything. If I wait, the slot is gone.

choices.text: Ask why the return is so high.
Tell him it is obviously fake.
Maybe Dimas knows what he is doing.

nodes.speaker: raka
nodes.text: He says the business is special and members get priority profit. I do not really understand the akad yet.

choices.text: Suggest verifying the akad and registration before any transfer.

nodes.speaker: raka
nodes.text: You do not have to mock me. I just want to help the family.

choices.text: Apologize and focus on checking facts together.

nodes.speaker: raka
nodes.text: Exactly. Dimas has screenshots from people who already got paid. I am leaning toward joining.

choices.text: Slow down and investigate anyway.

nodes.speaker: system
nodes.text: You have until 16:00. Naya may know what happens after someone joins. Dimas is presenting at the coworking space later. Bank Syariah can help explain legitimate alternatives.

nodes.speaker: naya
nodes.text: Raka told you? I joined last month. It looked real at first. Please do not tell everyone.

choices.text: Ask gently whether she managed to withdraw.
Pressure her to admit it was a scam.

nodes.speaker: naya
nodes.text: I tried to withdraw. They said the system was busy and then asked me to invite two friends first. I saved the chat.

choices.text: Collect Naya's withdrawal proof.

nodes.speaker: naya
nodes.text: Dimas also sent a voice note saying returns are guaranteed if we do not panic. That sounded wrong after I thought about it.

choices.text: Save the guaranteed-return voice note.

nodes.speaker: naya
nodes.text: Forget it. I should not have said anything.

nodes.speaker: dimas
nodes.text: You are early. Smart people move before the crowd. Our members help halal businesses and receive consistent monthly returns.

choices.text: Ask for registration and audited business reports.
Praise the pitch and ask how to join fast.

nodes.speaker: dimas
nodes.text: Registration is being processed. The important thing is trust and speed. If you wait for paperwork, you miss the blessing.

choices.text: Collect the missing-registration clue.
Collect the pitch materials on the table.

nodes.speaker: system
nodes.text: The materials use phrases like profit sharing, but the actual terms are vague. The referral chart is clearer than the business model.

nodes.speaker: dimas
nodes.text: Good. Bring Raka and I will keep one slot. Do not overthink. Winners move.

nodes.speaker: ustadz_farid
nodes.text: We can discuss principles, not issue a personal ruling. Start with transparency: what is the akad, where is the money used, who bears loss, and what evidence supports the profit claim?

choices.text: Ask about gharar in unclear investment contracts.
Ask about legitimate alternatives.

nodes.speaker: ustadz_farid
nodes.text: If profit, loss, business activity, and ownership are unclear, the uncertainty is not just paperwork. It changes the ethical quality of the decision.

choices.text: Note that proper musyarakah requires clear profit-loss sharing.

nodes.speaker: ustadz_farid
nodes.text: Alternatives like sukuk or CWLS are not magic and still carry risk, but legitimate products should explain issuer, use of funds, risk, and rights more clearly.

choices.text: Prepare to explain this to Raka.

nodes.speaker: system
nodes.text: The evidence is building. When ready, make a final recommendation before 16:00.

nodes.speaker: raka
nodes.text: Dimas keeps messaging me. What should I do?

choices.text: Tell him you are ready to make the final recommendation.

nodes.speaker: system
nodes.text: Choose your recommendation for Raka. This determines the ending together with evidence, trust, risk awareness, and sharia reasoning.

choices.text: Join the scheme.
Avoid the scheme because it is too risky.
Avoid it and consider legitimate Islamic finance alternatives.
Delay until registration, business reports, and akad are verified.
Report the concern and warn others carefully.

nodes.speaker: system
nodes.text: Your recommendation is recorded. Open the ending screen through the deadline or continue to review the result.
